title: UCNS — Unit Circle Number System
description: Unit Circle Number System: a recursive factorization engine over epicyclic objects on the doubled cover of the unit circle. Includes Theorem N (catalogue-sufficient factorization) and the Carrier-LCM Law (DEFENDED + TEST-BACKED via the carrier-support-pruning substrate, 324 tests / 2564 subtests), plus a Lean 4 core formalization whose theorems are explicitly sorry-stubbed and confer no defended status.
